pico.population: athletes healthy adults resistance-trained individuals sportsmen
pico.intervention_or_exposure: optimal load power load load for peak power optimal power load
pico.comparator: different loads various loads submaximal loads maximal loads load spectrum
pico.outcomes: power output peak power maximal power muscle power
pico.study_design_preference: RCT / systematic review / meta-analysis / clinical trial

searches.query: ("power load"[Title/Abstract] OR "optimal load"[Title/Abstract] OR "load that maximizes power"[Title/Abstract] OR "peak power load"[Title/Abstract] OR "load for peak power"[Title/Abstract]) AND ("power output"[Title/Abstract] OR "peak power"[Title/Abstract] OR "maximal power"[Title/Abstract] OR "muscle power"[Title/Abstract]) AND ("resistance training"[Title/Abstract] OR "strength training"[Title/Abstract] OR "weight training"[Title/Abstract] OR "exercise"[Title/Abstract]) NOT ("animal"[Title/Abstract] OR "rat"[Title/Abstract] OR "mouse"[Title/Abstract] OR "cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "in vitro"[Title/Abstract] OR "mice"[Title/Abstract] OR "animal model"[Title/Abstract])
